# kwizly

**Kwizly** is a modern, student-friendly web application designed to make studying faster, smarter, and more efficient—without requiring accounts, subscriptions, or ads.

---

## Features

### Flashcards & Decks

* Create your own flashcards manually
* Import files (PDF and more) to generate decks
* Add images to flashcards
* Organize content into decks


### Quiz System

* Multiple quiz types:

  * Multiple Choice (MCQ)
  * True or False (T/F)
  * Identification
  * Cloze (fill-in-the-blank)
  * Mixed / Randomized
* Maximum of 50 questions per quiz
* Option for auto-generated or custom quizzes

---

### Smart Learning System

* Spaced repetition:

  * “Hard” cards appear more frequently
  * “Easy” cards appear less often
* Review mistakes after quizzes
* Rate questions: **Hard, Good, Easy**

---

### Import & Export

* Import decks from files
* Export decks into a single shareable file
* Easily share with classmates

---

### Motivation System

* Daily study streak tracker
* Encourages consistent learning habits

---

### Accessibility

* Works on any device:

  * Mobile
  * Tablet
  * Desktop

---

## Pages Overview

### Homepage

* App title and tagline
* Instructions / tutorial
* About section
* Start button

### Deck Page

* View all created decks
* Create, import, export, or delete decks

### Deck Creation

* Manual flashcard creation
* File import + AI generation

### Flashcard Mode

* Flip cards
* Rate difficulty (Hard, Good, Easy)

### Quiz Mode

* Choose quiz type
* Answer questions
* View score and performance

### Review Mode

* Review incorrect answers
* Reinforce difficult questions

---

## Goals

Kwizly is built to:

* Remove barriers to studying (no login, no ads)
* Help students retain information efficiently
* Provide a simple yet powerful study tool

---

## License

This project is open for educational and personal use.

---

## Tagline

**“Study smarter, not harder—with Kwizly.”**
